text: bshnt shlvsh lmlkhvt yhvyqym mlkh-yhvdh b' nbvkhdn'tsr mlkh-bbl yrvshlm vytsr 'lyh
vytn 'dny bydv 't-yhvyqym mlkh-yhvdh vmqtst khly byt-h'lhym vyby'm 'rts-shn'r byt 'lhyv v't-hkhlym hby' byt 'vtsr 'lhyv
vy'mr hmlkh l'shfnz rb srysyv lhby' mbny yshr'l vmzr' hmlvkhh vmn-hfrtmym
yldym 'shr 'yn-bhm khl- [m'vm kh] (mvm q) vtvby mr'h vmshkhylym bkhl-chkhmh vyd'y d't vmbyny md' v'shr khch bhm l'md bhykhl hmlkh vllmdm sfr vlshvn khshdym
vymn lhm hmlkh dbr-yvm byvmv mft-bg hmlkh vmyyn mshtyv vlgdlm shnym shlvsh vmqtstm y'mdv lfny hmlkh
vyhy bhm mbny yhvdh dny'l chnnyh mysh'l v'zryh
vyshm lhm shr hsrysym shmvt vyshm ldny'l bltsh'tsr vlchnnyh shdrkh vlmysh'l myshkh vl'zryh 'bd ngv
vyshm dny'l 'l-lbv 'shr l'-ytg'l bftbg hmlkh vbyyn mshtyv vybqsh mshr hsrysym 'shr l' ytg'l
vytn h'lhym 't-dny'l lchsd vlrchmym lfny shr hsrysym
vy'mr shr hsrysym ldny'l yr' 'ny 't-'dny hmlkh 'shr mnh 't-m'khlkhm v't-mshtykhm 'shr lmh yr'h 't-fnykhm z'fym mn-hyldym 'shr khgylkhm vchybtm 't-r'shy lmlkh
vy'mr dny'l 'l-hmltsr 'shr mnh shr hsrysym 'l-dny'l chnnyh mysh'l v'zryh
ns-n' 't-'bdykh ymym 'shrh vytnv-lnv mn-hzr'ym vn'khlh vmym vnshth
vyr'v lfnykh mr'ynv vmr'h hyldym h'khlym 't ftbg hmlkh vkh'shr tr'h 'shh 'm-'bdykh
vyshm' lhm ldbr hzh vynsm ymym 'shrh
vmqtst ymym 'shrh nr'h mr'yhm tvb vbry'y bshr mn-khl-hyldym h'khlym 't ftbg hmlkh
vyhy hmltsr nsh' 't-ftbgm vyyn mshtyhm vntn lhm zr'nym
vhyldym h'lh 'rb'tm ntn lhm h'lhym md' vhshkhl bkhl-sfr vchkhmh vdny'l hbyn bkhl-chzvn vchlmvt
vlmqtst hymym 'shr-'mr hmlkh lhby'm vyby'm shr hsrysym lfny nbkhdntsr
vydbr 'tm hmlkh vl' nmts' mkhlm khdny'l chnnyh mysh'l v'zryh vy'mdv lfny hmlkh
vkhl dbr chkhmt bynh 'shr-bqsh mhm hmlkh vymts'm 'shr ydvt 'l khl-hchrtmym h'shfym 'shr bkhl-mlkhvtv
vyhy dny'l 'd-shnt 'cht lkhvrsh hmlkh  f
vbshnt shtym lmlkhvt nbkhdntsr chlm nbkhdntsr chlmvt vttf'm rvchv vshntv nhyth 'lyv
vy'mr hmlkh lqr' lchrtmym vl'shfym vlmkhshfym vlkhshdym lhgyd lmlkh chlmtyv vyb'v vy'mdv lfny hmlkh
vy'mr lhm hmlkh chlvm chlmty vtf'm rvchy ld't 't-hchlvm
vydbrv hkhshdym lmlkh 'rmyt mlkh' l'lmyn chyy 'mr chlm' [l'bdykh kh] (l'bdkh q) vfshr' nchv'
'nh mlkh' v'mr [lkhshdy' kh] (lkhshd'y q) mlt' mny 'zd' hn l' thvd'vnny chlm' vfshrh hdmyn tt'bdvn vbtykhvn nvly ytshmvn
vhn chlm' vfshrh thchvn mtnn vnbzbh vyqr shgy' tqblvn mn-qdmy lhn chlm' vfshrh hchvny
'nv tnynvt v'mryn mlkh' chlm' y'mr l'bdvhy vfshrh nhchvh
'nh mlkh' v'mr mn-ytsyb yd' 'nh dy 'dn' 'ntvn zbnyn khl-qbl dy chzytvn dy 'zd' mny mlt'
dy hn-chlm' l' thvd'nny chdh-hy' dtkhvn vmlh khdbh vshchyth [hzmntvn kh] (hzdmntvn  q) lm'mr qdmy 'd dy 'dn' yshtn' lhn chlm' 'mrv ly v'nd' dy fshrh thchvnny
'nv [khshdy' kh] (khshd'y q) qdm-mlkh' v'mryn l'-'yty 'nsh 'l-ybsht' dy mlt mlkh' yvkhl lhchvyh khl-qbl dy khl-mlkh rb vshlyt mlh khdnh l' sh'l lkhl-chrtm v'shf vkhshdy
vmlt' dy-mlkhh sh'l yqyrh v'chrn l' 'yty dy ychvnh qdm mlkh' lhn 'lhyn dy mdrhvn 'm-bshr' l' 'ytvhy
khl-qbl dnh mlkh' bns vqtsf shgy' v'mr lhvbdh lkhl chkhymy bbl
vdt' nfqt vchkhymy' mtqtlyn vb'v dny'l vchbrvhy lhtqtlh  f
b'dyn dny'l  htyb 't' vt'm l'ryvkh rb-tbchy' dy mlkh' dy nfq lqtlh lchkhymy bbl
'nh v'mr l'ryvkh shlyt' dy-mlkh' 'l-mh dt' mhchtsfh mn-qdm mlkh' 'dyn mlt' hvd' 'ryvkh ldny'l
vdny'l 'l vb'h mn-mlkh' dy zmn yntn-lh vfshr' lhchvyh lmlkh'  f
'dyn dny'l lbyth 'zl vlchnnyh mysh'l v'zryh chbrvhy mlt' hvd'
vrchmyn lmb'' mn-qdm 'lh shmy'  'l-rzh dnh dy l' yhbdvn dny'l vchbrvhy 'm-sh'r chkhymy bbl
'dyn ldny'l bchzv' dy-lyly' rzh gly 'dyn dny'l brkh l'lh shmy'
'nh dny'l v'mr lhv' shmh dy-'lh' mbrkh mn-'lm' v'd-'lm' dy chkhmt' vgbvrt' dy lh-hy'
vhv' mhshn' 'dny' vzmny' mh'dh mlkhyn vmhqym mlkhyn yhb chkhmt' lchkhymyn vmnd'' lyd'y bynh
hv' gl' 'myqt' vmstrt' yd' mh bchshvkh' [vnhyr' kh] (vnhvr' q) 'mh shr'
lkh  'lh 'bhty mhvd' vmshbch 'nh dy chkhmt' vgbvrt' yhbt ly vkh'n hvd'tny dy-b'yn' mnkh dy-mlt mlkh' hvd'tn'
khl-qbl dnh dny'l 'l 'l-'ryvkh dy mny mlkh' lhvbdh lchkhymy bbl 'zl  vkhn 'mr-lh lchkhymy bbl 'l-thvbd h'lny qdm mlkh' vfshr' lmlkh' 'chv'    s
'dyn 'ryvkh bhtbhlh hn'l ldny'l qdm mlkh' vkhn 'mr-lh dy-hshkhcht gbr mn-bny glvt' dy yhvd dy fshr' lmlkh' yhvd'
'nh mlkh' v'mr ldny'l dy shmh bltsh'tsr [h'ytykh kh] (h'ytkh q) khhl lhvd'tny chlm' dy-chzyt vfshrh
'nh dny'l qdm mlkh' v'mr rzh dy-mlkh' sh'l l' chkhymyn 'shfyn chrtmyn gzryn ykhlyn lhchvyh lmlkh'
brm 'yty 'lh bshmy' gl' rzyn vhvd' lmlkh' nbvkhdntsr mh dy lhv' b'chryt yvmy' chlmkh vchzvy r'shkh 'l-mshkhbkh dnh hv'  f
['nth kh] ('nt  q) mlkh' r'yvnkh 'l-mshkhbkh slqv mh dy lhv' 'chry dnh vgl' rzy' hvd'kh mh-dy lhv'
v'nh l' bchkhmh dy-'yty by mn-khl-chyy' rz' dnh gly ly lhn 'l-dbrt dy fshr' lmlkh' yhvd'vn vr'yvny lbbkh tnd'
['nth kh] ('nt  q) mlkh' chzh hvyt v'lv tslm chd shgy' tslm' dkhn rb vzyvh ytyr q'm lqblkh vrvh dchyl
hv' tslm' r'shh dy-dhb tb chdvhy vdr'vhy dy khsf m'vhy vyrkhth dy nchsh
shqvhy dy frzl rglvhy [mnhvn kh] (mnhyn q) dy frzl [vmnhvn kh] (vmnhyn q) dy chsf
chzh hvyt 'd dy htgzrt 'bn dy-l' bydyn vmcht ltslm' 'l-rglvhy dy frzl' vchsf' vhdqt hmvn
b'dyn dqv khchdh frzl' chsf' nchsh' khsf' vdhb' vhvv kh'vr mn-'dry-qyt vnsh' hmvn rvch' vkhl-'tr l'-hshtkhch lhvn v'bn'  dy-mcht ltslm' hvt ltvr rb vmlt khl-'r''
dnh chlm' vfshrh n'mr qdm-mlkh'
['nth kh] ('nt  q) mlkh' mlkh mlkhy' dy 'lh shmy' mlkhvt' chsn' vtqf' vyqr' yhb-lkh
vbkhl-dy [d'ryn kh] (dyryn q) bny-'nsh' chyvt br' v'vf-shmy' yhb bydkh vhshltkh bkhlhvn ['nth kh] ('nt-hv'  q) r'shh dy dhb'
vbtrkh tqvm mlkhv 'chry 'r''  mnkh vmlkhv [tlyty' kh] (tlyt'h q) 'chry dy nchsh' dy tshlt bkhl-'r''
vmlkhv [rby'yh kh] (rby''h q) thv' tqyfh khfrzl' khl-qbl dy frzl' mhdq vchshl khl' vkhfrzl' dy-mr'' khl-'lyn tdq vtr'
vdy-chzyth rgly' v'tsb't' [mnhvn kh] (mnhn  q) chsf dy-fchr [vmnhvn kh] (vmnhyn q) frzl mlkhv flygh thvh vmn-ntsbt' dy frzl' lhv'-bh khl-qbl dy chzyth frzl' m'rb bchsf tyn'
v'tsb't rgly' [mnhvn kh] (mnhyn q) frzl [vmnhvn kh] (vmnhyn q) chsf mn-qtst mlkhvt' thvh tqyfh vmnh thvh tbyrh
[dy kh] (vdy q) chzyt frzl' m'rb bchsf tyn' mt'rbyn lhvn bzr' 'nsh' vl'-lhvn dbqyn dnh 'm-dnh h'-khdy frzl' l' mt'rb 'm-chsf'
vbyvmyhvn dy mlkhy' 'nvn yqym 'lh shmy' mlkhv dy l'lmyn l' ttchbl vmlkhvth l'm 'chrn l' tshtbq tdq vtsyf khl-'lyn mlkhvt' vhy' tqvm l'lmy'
khl-qbl dy-chzyt dy mtvr' 'tgzrt 'bn dy-l' bydyn vhdqt frzl' nchsh' chsf' khsf' vdhb' 'lh rb hvd' lmlkh' mh dy lhv' 'chry dnh vytsyb chlm' vmhymn fshrh  f
b'dyn mlkh' nbvkhdntsr nfl 'l-'nfvhy vldny'l sgd vmnchh vnychchyn 'mr lnskhh lh
'nh mlkh' ldny'l v'mr mn-qsht dy 'lhkhvn hv' 'lh 'lhyn vmr' mlkhyn vglh rzyn dy ykhlt lmgl' rzh dnh
'dyn mlkh' ldny'l rby vmtnn rbrbn shgy'n yhb-lh vhshlth 'l khl-mdynt bbl vrb-sgnyn 'l khl-chkhymy bbl
vdny'l b'' mn-mlkh' vmny 'l 'bydt' dy mdynt bbl lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv vdny'l btr' mlkh'  f
nbvkhdntsr mlkh' 'bd tslm dy-dhb rvmh 'myn shtyn ftyh 'myn sht 'qymh bbq't dvr' bmdynt bbl
vnbvkhdntsr mlkh' shlch lmkhnsh  l'chshdrfny' sgny' vfchvt' 'drgzry' gdbry' dtbry' tfty' vkhl shltny mdynt' lmt' lchnkht tslm' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh'
b'dyn mtkhnshyn 'chshdrfny' sgny' vfchvt'  'drgzry' gdbry' dtbry' tfty' vkhl shltny mdynt' lchnkht tslm' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh' [vq'myn kh] (vqymyn q) lqbl tslm' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr
vkhrvz' qr' bchyl lkhvn 'mryn 'mmy' 'my' vlshny'
b'dn' dy-tshm'vn ql qrn' mshrvqyt' [qytrvs kh] (qtrvs q) sbkh' fsntryn svmfnyh vkhl zny zmr' tflvn vtsgdvn ltslm dhb' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh'
vmn-dy-l' yfl vysgd bh-sh't' ytrm' lgv'-'tvn nvr' yqdt'
khl-qbl dnh bh-zmn' khdy shm'yn khl-'mmy' ql qrn' mshrvqyt' [qytrs kh] (qtrvs q) shbkh' fsntryn vkhl zny zmr' nflyn khl-'mmy' 'my' vlshny' sgdyn ltslm dhb' dy hqym nbvkhdntsr mlkh'
khl-qbl dnh bh-zmn' qrbv gbryn khshd'yn v'khlv qrtsyhvn dy yhvdy'
'nv v'mryn lnbvkhdntsr mlkh' mlkh' l'lmyn chyy
['nth kh] ('nt q) mlkh' shmt t'm dy khl-'nsh dy-yshm' ql qrn' mshrqyt' [qytrs kh] (qtrvs q) shbkh' fsntryn [vsyfnyh kh] (vsvfnyh q) vkhl zny zmr' yfl vysgd ltslm dhb'
vmn-dy-l' yfl vysgd ytrm' lgv'-'tvn nvr' yqdt'
'yty gbryn yhvd'yn dy-mnyt ythvn 'l-'bydt mdynt bbl shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv gbry' 'lkh l'-shmv ['lykh kh] ('lkh q) mlkh' t'm [l'lhykh kh] (l'lhkh q) l' flchyn vltslm dhb' dy hqymt l' sgdyn    s
b'dyn nbvkhdntsr brgz vchmh 'mr lhytyh lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv b'dyn gbry' 'lkh hytyv qdm mlkh'
'nh nbkhdntsr v'mr lhvn htsd' shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv l'lhy l' 'ytykhvn flchyn vltslm dhb' dy hqymt l' sgdyn

kh'n hn 'ytykhvn 'tydyn dy b'dn' dy-tshm'vn ql qrn' mshrvqyt' [qytrs kh] (qtrvs  q) shbkh' fsntryn vsvmfnyh vkhl  zny zmr' tflvn vtsgdvn ltslm' dy-'bdt vhn l' tsgdvn bh-sh'th ttrmvn lgv'-'tvn nvr' yqdt' vmn-hv' 'lh dy  yshyzbnkhvn mn-ydy
'nv shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv v'mryn lmlkh' nbvkhdntsr l'-chshchyn 'nchnh 'l-dnh ftgm lhtbvtkh
hn 'yty 'lhn' dy-'nchn' flchyn ykhl lshyzbvtn' mn-'tvn nvr' yqdt' vmn-ydkh mlkh' yshyzb
vhn l' ydy' lhv'-lkh mlkh' dy l'lhykh  l'- ['ytyn' kh] ('ytn' q) flchyn vltslm dhb' dy hqymt l' nsgd    s
b'dyn nbvkhdntsr htmly chm' vtslm 'nfvhy ['shtnv kh] ('shtny q) 'l-shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv 'nh v'mr lmz' l'tvn' chd-shb'h 'l dy chzh lmzyh
vlgbryn gbry-chyl dy bchylh 'mr lkhfth lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv lmrm' l'tvn nvr' yqdt'
b'dyn gbry'  'lkh khftv bsrblyhvn [ftyshyhvn kh] (ftshyhvn  q) vkhrblthvn vlbshyhvn vrmyv lgv'-'tvn nvr' yqdt'
khl-qbl dnh mn-dy mlt mlkh' mchtsfh v'tvn' 'zh ytyr' gbry' 'lkh dy hsqv lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv qtl hmvn shbyb' dy nvr'
vgbry' 'lkh tlthvn shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv nflv lgv'-'tvn-nvr' yqdt' mkhftyn  f
'dyn nbvkhdntsr mlkh' tvh vqm bhtbhlh 'nh v'mr lhdbrvhy hl' gbryn tlt' rmyn' lgv'-nvr' mkhftyn 'nyn v'mryn lmlkh' ytsyb' mlkh'
'nh v'mr h'-'nh chzh gbryn 'rb'h shryn mhlkhyn bgv'-nvr' vchbl l'-'yty bhvn vrvh dy [rby'y' kh] (rby''h q) dmh lbr-'lhyn    s
b'dyn qrb nbvkhdntsr ltr' 'tvn nvr' yqdt' 'nh v'mr shdrkh myshkh v'bd-ngv 'bdvhy dy-'lh' ['ly' kh] ('l'h q) fqv v'tv b'dyn nfqyn shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv mn-gv' nvr'
vmtkhnshyn 'chshdrfny' sgny' vfchvt' vhdbry mlkh' chzyn lgbry' 'lkh dy l'-shlt nvr' bgshmhvn vsh'r r'shhvn l' htchrkh vsrblyhvn l' shnv vrych nvr l' 'dt bhvn

'nh nbvkhdntsr v'mr brykh 'lhhvn dy-shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv dy-shlch ml'khh vshyzb l'bdvhy dy htrchtsv 'lvhy vmlt mlkh' shnyv vyhbv [gshmyhvn kh] (gshmhvn  q) dy l'-yflchvn vl'-ysgdvn lkhl-'lh lhn l'lhhvn
vmny shym t'm dy khl-'m 'mh vlshn dy-y'mr [shlh kh] (shlv q) 'l 'lhhvn dy-shdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv' hdmyn yt'bd vbyth nvly yshtvh khl-qbl dy l' 'yty 'lh 'chrn dy-ykhl lhtslh khdnh
b'dyn mlkh' htslch lshdrkh myshkh v'bd ngv bmdynt bbl  f
nbvkhdntsr mlkh' lkhl-'mmy' 'my' vlshny' dy- [d'ryn kh] (dyryn q) bkhl-'r'' shlmkhvn yshg'
'ty' vtmhy' dy 'bd 'my 'lh' ['ly' kh] ('l'h q) shfr qdmy lhchvyh
'tvhy khmh rbrbyn vtmhvhy khmh tqyfyn mlkhvth mlkhvt 'lm vshltnh 'm-dr vdr
'nh nbvkhdntsr shlh hvyt bbyty vr'nn bhykhly
chlm chzyt vydchlnny vhrhryn 'l-mshkhby vchzvy r'shy ybhlnny
vmny shym t'm lhn'lh qdmy lkhl chkhymy bbl dy-fshr chlm' yhvd'nny
b'dyn ['llyn kh] ('lyn q) chrtmy' 'shfy' [khshdy' kh] (khshd'y q) vgzry' vchlm' 'mr 'nh qdmyhvn vfshrh l'-mhvd'yn ly
v'd 'chryn 'l qdmy dny'l dy-shmh bltsh'tsr khshm 'lhy vdy rvch-'lhyn qdyshyn bh vchlm' qdmvhy 'mrt
bltsh'tsr rb chrtmy' dy  'nh yd't dy rvch 'lhyn qdyshyn bkh vkhl-rz l'-'ns lkh chzvy chlmy dy-chzyt vfshrh 'mr
vchzvy r'shy 'l-mshkhby chzh hvyt v'lv 'yln bgv' 'r'' vrvmh shgy'
rbh 'yln' vtqf vrvmh ymt' lshmy' vchzvth lsvf khl-'r''
'fyh shfyr v'nbh shgy' vmzvn lkhl'-bh tchtvhy ttll  chyvt br' vb'nfvhy [ydrvn kh] (ydvrn q) tsfry shmy' vmnh ytzyn khl-bshr'
chzh hvyt bchzvy r'shy 'l-mshkhby v'lv 'yr vqdysh mn-shmy' ncht
qr' bchyl vkhn 'mr gdv 'yln' vqtstsv 'nfvhy 'trv 'fyh vbdrv 'nbh tnd chyvt' mn-tchtvhy vtsfry' mn-'nfvhy
brm 'qr shrshvhy b'r'' shbqv vb'svr dy-frzl vnchsh bdt'' dy br' vbtl shmy' ytstb' v'm-chyvt' chlqh b'shb 'r''
lbbh mn- ['nvsh' kh] ('nsh' q) yshnvn vlbb chyvh ytyhb lh vshb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn 'lvhy
bgzrt 'yryn ftgm' vm'mr qdyshyn sh'lt' 'd-dbrt dy ynd'vn chyy' dy-shlyt ['ly' kh] ('l'h q) bmlkhvt ['nvsh' kh] ('nsh'  q) vlmn-dy ytsb' ytnnh vshfl 'nshym yqym ['lyh kh] ('lh q)
dnh chlm' chzyt 'nh mlkh' nbvkhdntsr [v'nth kh] (v'nt q) bltsh'tsr fshr'  'mr khl-qbl dy  khl-chkhymy mlkhvty l'-ykhlyn fshr' lhvd'tny [v'nth kh] (v'nt q) khhl dy rvch-'lhyn qdyshyn bkh

'dyn dny'l dy-shmh bltsh'tsr 'shtvmm khsh'h chdh vr'ynhy ybhlnh 'nh mlkh' v'mr bltsh'tsr chlm' vfshr' 'l-ybhlkh 'nh bltsh'tsr v'mr [mr'y kh] (mry q) chlm' [lshn'ykh kh] (lshn'kh q) vfshrh [l'rykh kh] (l'rkh  q)
'yln' dy chzyt dy rbh vtqf vrvmh ymt' lshmy' vchzvth lkhl-'r''
v'fyh shfyr v'nbh shgy' vmzvn lkhl'-bh tchtvhy tdvr chyvt br' vb'nfvhy yshkhnn tsfry shmy'
['nth kh] ('nt-hv' q) mlkh' dy rbyt vtqft vrbvtkh rbt vmtt lshmy' vshltnkh lsvf 'r''
vdy chzh mlkh' 'yr vqdysh ncht  mn-shmy' v'mr gdv 'yln' vchblvhy brm 'qr shrshvhy b'r'' shbqv vb'svr dy-frzl vnchsh bdt'' dy br' vbtl shmy' ytstb' v'm-chyvt br' chlqh 'd dy-shb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn 'lvhy
dnh fshr' mlkh' vgzrt ['ly' kh] ('l'h q) hy' dy mtt 'l- [mr'y kh] (mry q) mlkh'

vlkh trdyn mn-'nsh' v'm-chyvt br' lhvh mdrkh v'shb' khtvryn  lkh yt'mvn vmtl shmy' lkh mtsb'yn vshb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn ['lykh kh] ('lkh  q) 'd dy-tnd' dy-shlyt ['ly' kh] ('l'h  q) bmlkhvt 'nsh' vlmn-dy ytsb' ytnnh
vdy 'mrv lmshbq 'qr shrshvhy dy 'yln' mlkhvtkh lkh qymh mn-dy tnd' dy shltn shmy'
lhn mlkh' mlkhy yshfr ['lykh kh] ('lkh q) [vchtykh kh] (vcht'kh q) btsdqh frq v'vytkh bmchn 'nyn hn thv' 'rkhh lshlvtkh
khl' mt' 'l-nbvkhdntsr mlkh'  f
lqtst yrchyn try-'shr 'l-hykhl mlkhvt' dy bbl mhlkh hvh
'nh mlkh' v'mr hl' d'-hy' bbl rbt' dy-'nh bnyth lbyt mlkhv btqf chsny vlyqr hdry
'vd mlt' bfm mlkh' ql mn-shmy' nfl lkh 'mryn nbvkhdntsr mlkh' mlkhvth 'dt mnkh
vmn-'nsh' lkh trdyn v'm-chyvt br' mdrkh 'shb' khtvryn lkh yt'mvn vshb'h 'dnyn ychlfvn ['lykh kh] ('lkh q) 'd dy-tnd' dy-shlyt ['ly' kh] ('l'h  q) bmlkhvt 'nsh' vlmn-dy ytsb' ytnnh
bh-sh't' mlt' sft 'l-nbvkhdntsr vmn-'nsh' tryd v'shb' khtvryn y'khl vmtl shmy' gshmh ytstb' 'd dy sh'rh khnshryn rbh vtfrvhy khtsfryn
vlqtst yvmyh 'nh nbvkhdntsr 'yny  lshmy' ntlt vmnd'y 'ly ytvb [vl'ly' kh] (vl'l'h q) brkht vlchy 'lm' shbcht vhdrt dy shltnh shltn 'lm vmlkhvth 'm-dr vdr
